channel.title: Abouts on Anirudh Vemula
channel.description: Recent content in Abouts on Anirudh Vemula

item.title: About
item.description: Anirudh is a graduate student in the Robotics Institute at Carnegie Mellon University. He works with Maxim Likhachev and Drew Bagnell on research areas at the intersection of planning and learning. He is supported by the TCS Presidential Fellowship. Anirudh tries to make robots move, grasp, think and plan. He fails often but every once in a while, he stumbles onto something. When not doing aforementioned, he can be seen
